title: Christmas Gingerbread Man Throw Pillow - 40cm Lovely Stuffed Decorative Pillow, Fun Gingerbread-Shaped Cushion for Sofa, Couch & Bedroom, Perfect Festive Christmas Decor (B)
features: 【Gingerbread Man Plush Decor】: Perfect for adding a holiday touch to your home, this Gingerbread Christmas Decoration enhances any space, whether placed on sofas, couches, or beds. It brings a festive atmosphere to every corner.

【Soft and Cozy Comfort】: Made from plush, skin-friendly fabric, the Gingerbread Pillow offers a luxuriously soft feel. It’s perfect for snuggling up during the holiday season, providing both comfort and warmth.

【Charming Festive Design】: Shaped like an adorable gingerbread man, this gingerbread man cushion is a fun and whimsical addition to your holiday decor. Its cute and cuddly design makes it a great accent piece for any room.

【Durable and Long-Lasting】: Crafted with tear-resistant and sturdy materials, the gingerbread man soft toy is designed to withstand cuddles from all ages. Built to last, it ensures enjoyment throughout the holiday season and beyond.

【Perfect Size】: Measuring approximately 16.93 x 12.99 inches, this Gingerbread Plush is generously sized, making it ideal for both cuddling and as a standout festive decoration. Its size adds charm and presence to your holiday setting.
description: Product description Celebrate the festive season with the charming Gingerbread Pillow, a delightful addition to your holiday decor. Measuring about 16.93 x 12.99 inches, this Gingerbread Plush is made from smooth and skin-friendly polyester, ensuring unmatched comfort and coziness. Its cute gingerbread man design adds a whimsical touch to your Christmas decorations, making it perfect for your home, sofa, or couch. Built to be robust and tear-resistant, this pillow can handle endless embraces from all ages. Whether you're decorating for the holidays or looking for a cozy accessory, this Gingerbread Christmas Decoration brings warmth, joy, and a touch of festive cheer to any setting.
